info.title: Changup Note App API
info.description: Versioned mobile API contract owned by cunote-web. Flutter clients should generate code from this document.

get.summary: Fetch the app v1 OpenAPI contract.

post.summary: Create an anonymous first-pass match teaser.
Exchange email credentials for app access and refresh tokens.
Rotate a refresh token and issue a new app token pair.
Revoke a refresh token or all tokens for the current device.
Exchange a native OAuth code for app tokens.

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: OAuth provider, for example google or kakao.

get.summary: List companies available to the current app user.

post.summary: Create or save the current user's company profile.

get.summary: Fetch ranked next actions for a company.

post.summary: Enrich a company profile from a business registration number.

200.description: Enriched company profile and non-PII provider facts.

post.summary: Verify company ownership with business-registration facts.

get.summary: List the current user's consent ledger entries for a company.

put.summary: Grant or refresh consent for a company data scope.

delete.summary: Revoke consent for a company data scope.

post.description: Plural path alias for mobile clients. The request currently updates one profile field per call.

get.summary: Fetch opportunity-map match cards for a company.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional eligibility or opportunity bucket filter.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response meta.

200.description: Next question, or null when none is useful.

get.summary: Fetch notification feed items derived from current matches.

post.summary: Mark a notification as read or dismissed for the current app user.

get.summary: Fetch an application-prep sheet for a grant.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: Optional company id. When omitted, the first accessible company is used.

post.summary: Save user feedback for a grant match.
Record an app interaction with a grant match.
Register the current mobile device for push delivery.
